Quote Test "Bursts" Forth

Air Date: January 01, 2099

Verifies titles with embedded double quotes render literally (no errant single quotes).


Transcript

CURWOOD: Welcome to the show.

DOERING: Thanks for having me.

CURWOOD: That figure should have its caption rendered.
